name: Waikiki Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 can pineapple tidbits, drained (reserve syrup) (13 1/2 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine meat, cracker crumbs, onion, egg, salt, ginger, and milk in a bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into balls using rounded tablespoonfuls.
3. Melt shortening in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Brown and cook meatballs in the skillet for 5-7 minutes, or until browned on all sides.
5. Remove meatballs from the skillet and keep warm.
6. Pour off excess fat from the skillet.
7. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch and brown sugar.
8. Stir in the reserved pineapple syrup, vinegar, and soy sauce until smooth.
9. Return the skillet to medium heat and pour in the cornstarch mixture.
10. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and boils.
11. Add meatballs, pineapple tidbits, and green pepper back into the skillet.
12. Heat through for an additional minute before serving.
13. Yield: Serves 6
